Localization.Description: Actions with groups and group contacts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" created new contact {object.name} belonging to group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" created new group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" deleted contact {object.name} belonging to group "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" exported a group to file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" exported a group from file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
